title: MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: WASHINGTON COUNTY DISABILITY, AGING AND VETERAN SERVICES MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF An organizational Representative Payee approved by the Social Security Administration (SSA) to receive Social Security benefits on a client’s behalf and issue payments for their monthly expenditures. 5240 NE Elam Young Parkway Suite 300 Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Individuals receiving Social Security retirement benefits, Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI), or Supplemental Security Income (SSI) Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (855) 673-2372 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (855) 673-2372 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near Hawthorn Farm MAX station Services: Representative Payee Services Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - CARE FACILITIES AND SENIOR HOUSING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BENEFITS ENROLLMENT CENTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOLUNTEERS PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WASHINGTON COUNTY DISABILITY, AGING AND VETERAN SERVICES
